activity: Confirm deployment package owner and secret owner
evidence: owner map with deployment_owner, operations_owner, security_owner, finance_owner
acceptance_gate: Every critical area has one accountable owner

activity: Deploy Week 19 package to staging or selected baseline host
evidence: compose ps output, HTTPS URL, /healthz status

activity: Store N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY and POSTGRES_PASSWORD in secret store
acceptance_gate: Secrets are recoverable and not stored in plaintext repo

activity: Run first backup and restore drill
evidence: pg_dump file, restore notes, credential-backed workflow test
acceptance_gate: Restore proves DB, credentials, and webhook work

evidence: log review notes and open incidents

acceptance_gate: Risky findings have owners and dates

activity: Run update window with backup first
evidence: release notes, previous image tag, target image tag, readiness evidence
acceptance_gate: Update or deferred update has explicit reason

activity: Set baseline cost and budget alerts
evidence: cost baseline, storage alert, egress alert
acceptance_gate: Budget alert exists for chosen platform

activity: Review execution data retention and DB growth
evidence: DB size trend and pruning settings
acceptance_gate: Retention policy is documented and applied

activity: Review memory, CPU, active executions, and webhook latency
acceptance_gate: No sustained capacity breach without owner

activity: Review top workflows by risk and business value
acceptance_gate: High-value workflows have owner and failure path
Unused or risky credentials are removed or justified

activity: Evaluate concurrency control before queue mode
evidence: active executions trend and N8N_CONCURRENCY_PRODUCTION_LIMIT decision
Redis/worker spike plan, DB connection review, rollback plan
acceptance_gate: Queue mode is approved, deferred, or rejected with evidence

activity: Evaluate n8n Cloud or PaaS for low-ops cases
acceptance_gate: Low-ops route has owner and migration note

activity: Evaluate AWS/GCP only if enterprise gates are true

acceptance_gate: Next-stage decision has owner, budget, and deadline
